title: KBTV-017 Yariman's friends are Yariman theory-2nd-
description: Yariman-chan was introduced by Mana who was a spear man as rumored! !! It's so cute that you might wonder, "Is this child really a spear man?" !! Since the spear man is more spear man than himself, it is definitely a spear man this time too! !! I called it up and verified it! !!
